title: BLADEZ Barbie Toyz Customizable Sticker Activity Set - 50pcs - Dolls, Stickers, Creative Accessories - Arts & Crafts Gifts For Girls
features: The information below applies to each unit in the pack
UNLEASH CREATIVITY - This Barbie Sticker Activity Set sparks imagination with customizable dolls & a variety of stickers and colouring sheets. Perfect for keeping young fans engaged and creative!
IDEAL FOR ON-THE-GO FUN - Perfect for Barbie girls on the move, this Barbie toy fits effortlessly into party bags or is great for quiet time at the coffee shop, providing endless Barbie gifts.
OFFICIALLY LICENSED BARBIE - An authentic Barbie product, this set includes a card Barbie doll and pop-out outfits for interactive play, making it a standout among Barbie accessories.
COMPLETE ART SET - Includes 2 card dolls, 3 sticker sheets, 2 sticker strips, 2 colouring sheets, and 3 coloured pens. This Barbie toy is a comprehensive arts & crafts kit that inspires hours of fun.
GREAT FOR ANY OCCASION - Whether for birthdays, holidays, or just because, this Barbie Sticker Activity Set makes a thoughtful and enjoyable Barbie gift for any Barbie girl who loves creativity.
